solution.name: Smart Home Assistant
solution.description: Smart home control with Home Assistant, Philips Hue, Tuya, Google Home, LG TV, and Bosch Home Connect.

platform_connectors.description: Home Assistant MCP with LG TV and Home Connect

skills.description: Setup and onboarding for smart home providers.

problem.statement: Users need to connect and configure smart home providers.
problem.context: Supports 6 providers with different setup flows.

scenarios.title: Get HA configuration
steps: User says: "Get HA configuration"
Agent calls ha.config.get — get ha configuration
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for get config is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Save HA config (URL, token)
steps: User says: "Save HA config (URL, token)"
Agent calls ha.config.save — save ha config (url, token)
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for save config is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Complete Home Connect OAuth

Agent calls ha.homeconnect.callback — complete home connect oauth
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for callback homeconnect is handled successfully.

skills.name: Connect My Home

skills.description: Control smart home devices via natural language. Supports Home Assistant, Philips Hue, Tuya/Smart Life, Google Home/Nest, LG TV, and Bosch Home Connect.

problem.statement: Users want to control all their smart home devices using natural language across multiple providers.
problem.context: Home has 6 providers: Home Assistant (core hub), Philips Hue (lights), Tuya/Smart Life (IoT), Google Home/Nest (thermostats), LG TV (WebOS), Bosch Home Connect (oven).
goals: Control any device with natural language
Query device states across all providers

scenarios.title: List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices
steps: User says: "List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices"
Agent calls ha.rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list rooms is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List all entities from Home Assistant, optionally filtered by domain
steps: User says: "List all entities from Home Assistant, optionally filtered by domain"
Agent calls ha.entities.list — list all entities from home assistant, optionally filtered by domain
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list entities is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get current state of a Home Assistant entity
steps: User says: "Get current state of a Home Assistant entity"
Agent calls ha.entity.state — get current state of a home assistant entity
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state entity is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Call a HA service to control a device (turn_on, turn_off, toggle)
steps: User says: "Call a HA service to control a device (turn_on, turn_off, toggle)"
Agent calls ha.services.call — call a ha service to control a device (turn_on, turn_off, toggle)
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for call service is handled successfully.

skills.name: Home Control

guardrails.rule: Execute device commands directly without asking for confirmation. Just do it and report the result.
For lock, garage, and alarm domains, ask the user to confirm first.
Route to hue-mcp for Hue lights, tuya-mcp for Tuya devices, google-home-mcp for Nest/Google devices. Default to home-assistant-mcp.
If a provider returns not-connected error, inform user and suggest connecting it.

connectors.description: Home Assistant MCP with LG TV and Home Connect
